companyNameJapanese: 株式会社SCREENホールディングス
description: Develops, manufactures, and markets semiconductor production equipment including wafer cleaning systems, coaters, and direct-write exposure systems. Also produces display production and PCB-related equipment.

majorClients: Foundries in China and North America
_externalRelationships.notes: #1 global market share in semiconductor cleaning (single wafer, batch, spin scrubber). Cumulative shipments exceed 15,000 units.

_metadata.dataSource: Yahoo Finance, CNBC, PitchBook, SCREEN SPE
_metadata.notes: Q1 FY2026 net sales: 135.7B JPY (+1.2% YoY). Growth drivers: Lemotia PLP coater, LeVina direct-write system. Strong in China (mature nodes) and North America (advanced).
